rationale: Strong promise (3x revenue, money-back guarantee) without supporting proof. Agent must flag the promise as risky/unsupported, NOT validate the claim, and demand evidence in follow-up questions.

input.raw_offer_text: Triple ton chiffre d'affaires en 30 jours grâce à ma méthode unique. Garantie satisfait ou remboursé.

must_pass: compliance.regulated_claims_risk OR proofs.unsupported_claims OR proofs.risky_claims_detected has at least one entry referencing the unproven 3x claim
missing.recommended_followup_questions includes a question requesting proof
